author: mark
text:
skill: name the remove-task path, narrow 'deferred'

Agents without a clear 'delete' command in SKILL.md fall back to
setting status=deferred on garbage tasks, and the deferred pile
grows into a graveyard. Three edits: a 'Removing unwanted or
duplicate tasks' subsection names 'bl update status=closed' as the
archive-an-unclaimed-task command (with the dup-link idiom); a
'Deferred vs closed' subsection scopes deferred narrowly; and the
'.balls/ files' warning is reworded so it clearly refers to the
on-disk store, not the task lifecycle. Commands table gains a row
for the close-unclaimed pattern.
